title: PCOMJR Data Ontology
description: Canonical type definitions for the TalonSight Technologies PCOMJR pipeline. This file is the single source of truth — TypeScript interfaces and Python Pydantic models are generated from it.

Division.description: CIAS = Creative Infrastructure As a Subscription. OIAS = Organizational Infrastructure As a Subscription.

CIASTerminalId.description: Identifiers for the five CIAS creative terminals.

TerminalId.description: Any terminal or system in the TST ecosystem.

CIASArtifactType.description: Artifact types produced by CIAS terminals.

OIASArtifactType.description: Artifact types produced by OIAS systems.

ArtifactType.description: Union of all artifact types across both divisions.

VerificationStatus.description: Lifecycle status of an artifact's cryptographic verification.

EvidenceType.description: Classification of evidence supporting a decision.

RelationType.description: Typed relationships between artifacts in the knowledge graph.

KnowledgeCategory.description: Classification of knowledge artifacts extracted from transcripts.

A2AIntent.description: Intent types for Agent-to-Agent protocol messages.

MemoryBusEventType.description: Event types flowing through the Memory Bus.

Artifact.description: Base artifact — the fundamental unit of work output in the PCOMJR pipeline. Every creative or organizational output is an artifact.

sourceTerminal.description: The terminal that produced this artifact.

powHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonical artifact representation.

powAnchoredAt.description: Timestamp when the artifact was anchored to the POW Ledger.

powEventId.description: Reference to the POW Ledger event that anchored this artifact.

hash.description: SHA-256 hex hash of the canonical content representation.

workspace.description: Workspace or context that produced this artifact.

sealed.description: Whether the artifact has been sealed to the POW Ledger.

Context.description: Structured context record — captures the conditions under which a decision was made. PCOMJR Stage 2.

assumptions.description: What is believed true but unverified.

environment.description: The technical, organizational, or market conditions.

Evidence.description: A piece of evidence supporting a decision. PCOMJR Stage 3 (Orchestrator output).

content.description: The evidence body text or summary.

Alternative.description: An alternative considered and rejected during decision-making.

Decision.description: An organizational decision — the core entity of the PCOMJR Judgment stage. Extends Artifact with decision-specific fields.

LedgerEntry.description: An entry in the POW Ledger — a tamper-evident record linking an artifact to its cryptographic proof.

artifactId.description: ID of the artifact being recorded.

artifactHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonical artifact.

signature.description: Chain link — hash incorporating the previous entry.

source.description: Which terminal or system created this entry.

SealEvent.description: Event emitted when a decision is sealed — cryptographically committed to the POW Ledger.

Verification.description: A verification record — proves an artifact existed in a specific form at a specific time.

Pattern.description: A detected pattern across multiple decisions or artifacts.

WorkflowProposal.description: A proposed reusable workflow derived from detected patterns.

Beat.description: A musical beat — Sonic Genesis artifact.

Loop.description: A multi-section loop arrangement — Sonic Genesis Loop Studio artifact.

FreestyleSession.description: A freestyle rap session — Da Cypher artifact.

LyricComposition.description: A written lyric composition — Da Cypher Lyric Mode artifact.

ProgressionSignal.description: A skill progression signal — Da Cypher training artifact.

ComicPanel.description: A single comic panel — TalonVision artifact.

ComicPage.description: A full comic page containing multiple panels — TalonVision artifact.

CharacterSheet.description: A character design sheet — TalonVision artifact.

LocationSheet.description: A location/environment design sheet — TalonVision artifact.

AnimationClip.description: An animation or video clip — TalonMotion artifact.

KnowledgeNode.description: A node in the Artifact Memory knowledge graph — extracted from AI chat transcripts.

RelationshipEdge.description: An edge in the knowledge graph connecting two artifacts or knowledge nodes.

SessionBrief.description: A generated summary of a workspace's artifacts — produced by Artifact Memory.

ConstellationCluster.description: A cluster in the constellation visualization — groups artifacts by workspace or origin.

TranscriptIngestion.description: Metadata for a transcript ingestion job in Artifact Memory.

AuditTrail.description: A complete audit trail for an artifact — all ledger entries and verifications.

IntegrityReport.description: Result of verifying an artifact's integrity against the POW Ledger.

A2AMessage.description: Agent-to-Agent protocol message — used for inter-agent communication in the POW Ledger system.

AgentIdentity.description: Identity record for a Talon Agent.

EventClaim.description: An agent's claim on an event for processing — uses atomic SELECT FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED.

TaskDelegation.description: A task delegated from the orchestrator to a specialist agent.

OrchestratorRouting.description: Routing decision made by the orchestrator agent — which agent handles which intent.

TerminalRegistration.description: Registration record for a terminal in the TST ecosystem.

artifactTypes.description: Artifact types this terminal is authorized to produce.

MemoryBusEvent.description: An event flowing through the Memory Bus — the central ingestion pathway for all artifact events across the TST ecosystem.

payload.description: The artifact or entity being reported.

powHash.description: Hash of the payload for integrity verification.

sourcePackageId.description: TalonVisionExport package this was rendered from.

stemUrls.description: Map of stem name to URL.

contexts.description: At least one context record is required.

evidences.description: At least one piece of evidence is required.

confidenceLevel.description: Predicted confidence in the decision's success.

artifactRef.description: ID of the artifact being listed.

originTerminal.description: Terminal where the original work occurred.

artifactCount.description: Number of artifacts in this cluster.
